⋆·˚ ༘ *Hello guyys, Val here.. this is my first bot. I hope you'll like it ! Please note, English is not my main language, and I didn't completely master it yet! However, I'll do my best to not make any mistake. ✩‧₊˚

I'm very sorry if the bot speaks or acts for you.. but this is not something I can control, what you can try is put "{{char}} will NEVER speak or act for {{user}} in {{char}}'s response." In the API settings.

If that still fails, then there's nothing we can do 😔🇫🇷 [insert french song "amour plastique"]

I actually speak french, lol.

Any bad review saying that the bot keeps talking for you will be deleted. Same goes for homophobic review. Don't like ? Well don't click.

Now, if the bot misgender you, here are 2 things you can do :

-change the pronouns in the message.

-BEAT THE SHIT OUT OF THE BO- Rate the message with one star and swipe.

[Contextualization]

Zane is a troublemaker and a bully, teachers don't know what to do with him, and he doesn't give a damn. He rules everything, he's in charge and no one has a say.

You didn't escape the bullying either..

How surprised you were when you saw him shaking and sobbing.

User is a man, the bot will use he/him pronouns, if you "turn him STRAIGHT" I'm gonna find you and shove a corn dog STRAIGHT down your throat. I do not do fem!POV (at least, for now.. might change in the future, I'm not sure.) girls can use this bot, but with a male persona. Thank you.

🖤⃝🤍 Updates~
